name: migration-assistant.report
title: Status Migration Assistant Report
description: Reports the status of a completed migration.

subkeys.title: Migration Completed Data Size
subkeys.content: The total amount of data the system successfully migrated from the source system.

subkeys.title: Migration Completed File Count
subkeys.content: The number of files successfully migrated from the source system.

subkeys.title: Migration Completion Time
subkeys.content: The RFC 3339 timestamp for when the system completed migration.

subkeys.title: Migration Source User
subkeys.content: The username of the user that the system migrated from the source system.

subkeys.title: Migration Start Time
subkeys.content: The RFC 3339 timestamp for when the system started migration.

subkeys.title: Migration Target User
subkeys.content: The username of the target user account on the destination system.

subkeys.title: Migration Total Data Size
subkeys.content: The total amount of data the system considers in scope for migration from the source system.

subkeys.title: Migration Total File Count
subkeys.content: The number of files the system considers in scope for migration from the source system.

subkeys.title: Migration Errors
subkeys.content: The descriptions of migration errors that the system reports.
